architectures.description: The instruction set architecture for the Lambda function.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) identifying the Lambda function.

code_sha256.description: The SHA-256 hash of the function's deployment package.

code_signing_config_arn.description: The ARN of the code signing configuration associated with the Lambda function.

dead_letter_config.description: The configuration for a dead letter queue that receives unprocessed messages.

description.description: The description of the Lambda function.

environment.description: The environment variables available to the Lambda function.

ephemeral_storage.description: The size of the ephemeral storage available to the Lambda function in MB.

file_system_config.description: The configuration for mounting an Amazon EFS file system.

handler.description: The function within your code that Lambda calls to begin execution.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Lambda function.

image_uri.description: The URI of the container image used by the Lambda function.

invoke_arn.description: The ARN used to invoke the Lambda function.

kms_key_arn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt function's environment variables.

last_modified.description: The date and time the function was last modified.

layers.description: The list of Lambda Layer ARNs attached to the function.

logging_config.description: The logging configuration for the Lambda function.

memory_size.description: The amount of memory available to the Lambda function in MB.

qualified_arn.description: The ARN of the Lambda function version.

qualified_invoke_arn.description: The ARN to invoke the specific version of the Lambda function.

reserved_concurrent_executions.description: The reserved number of concurrent executions for the Lambda function.

role.description: The IAM role ARN that the Lambda function assumes during execution.

runtime.description: The runtime environment for the Lambda function.

signing_job_arn.description: The ARN of the signing job for the Lambda function.

signing_profile_version_arn.description: The ARN of the signing profile version for the Lambda function.

source_code_hash.description: The base64-encoded SHA-256 hash of the deployment package.

source_code_size.description: The size of the deployment package in bytes.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the Lambda function.

timeout.description: The maximum amount of time the Lambda function can run in seconds.

tracing_config.description: The tracing mode for AWS X-Ray.

version.description: The version of the Lambda function.

vpc_config.description: The VPC configuration for the Lambda function.
